release_notes:
- 2.8.2 is a rollup release with automated build testing and InfluxDB support.
- Probe handling, FPing command-line behavior, SSH handling, zoom mode URLs, cropper relative-time entry, config reloads for slaves, templates, loss colors, and graph titles were improved.
- Fixes include restoring FindBin, adding the missing README, and correcting spelling in FTPtransfer.pm.
